name: curiosity_gap
formula: The X that Y — without saying which X
example: The CLI tool that replaced 4 apps for me

name: mistake
formula: You're doing X wrong / Stop doing X
example: You're using Ctrl+F wrong. There's a faster way

name: contrarian
formula: Everything you know about X is outdated
example: Print debugging isn't lazy. Bad print debugging is

name: number_outcome
formula: N things that get you OUTCOME
example: 4 terminal tricks that save me an hour every week

name: insider_secret
formula: What nobody tells beginners about X
example: What senior devs actually do when code breaks

name: before_after
formula: I used to X. Now I Y
example: I used to click through folders for minutes. Now it takes 2 keystrokes

name: loss_aversion
formula: You're losing X by not knowing Y
example: Every day without shortcuts costs you 30 minutes

name: specific_result
example: My Python installs got 10x faster. One word changed: uv

name: forbidden
formula: The X they don't teach in courses
example: The debugging skill no bootcamp teaches

name: identity_call
formula: If you X, this is for you
example: If your terminal looks like 2010, swipe

name: challenge
formula: Bet you can't X / Most devs fail this
example: 90% of devs can't explain what jq does

name: one_thing

example: The one keyboard shortcut that pays rent

name: story_open
example: 3am. Production down. One command saved us

name: question_hook
example: Why is your laptop slower than your phone?
